title: Crispy Umami Canadian Chickpea Hash
description: A hearty, Mediterranean‑friendly chickpea hash bursting with umami and allspice, perfect for a hangover cure and a crispy finish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat. Add diced onion and cook until translucent, 3‑4 minutes.
Add minced garlic, smoked paprika, cumin, thyme, and crushed allspice berries; sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste, maple syrup, and lemon juice; cook 1‑2 minutes to combine.
Add drained chickpeas, breaking up any clumps with a wooden spoon; season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to medium; cover and let simmer for 5 minutes so flavors meld.
Increase heat to medium‑high, remove the lid, and allow the hash to cook until chickpeas develop a golden crust, 8‑10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While chickpeas crisp, melt butter in a small pan and drizzle over hash for extra crispness if desired.
Taste and adjust seasoning; remove from heat.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley (optional) for a bright finish.
Serve hot as a hearty lunch or dinner; pair with citrus‑flavored water to aid hangover recovery.
